content: Uranus has 27 known moons. The five largest are Miranda, Ariel, Umbriel, Titania, and Oberon. The other moons include Caliban, Sycorax, Portia, Cressida, Desdemona, Juliet, Ophelia, Bianca, Cordelia, Puck, Portia, and several others, including some that are smaller and less well-known.
raw_content: Uranus has 27 known moons. The five largest are Miranda, Ariel, Umbriel, Titania, and Oberon. The other moons include Caliban, Sycorax, Portia, Cressida, Desdemona, Juliet, Ophelia, Bianca, Cordelia, Puck, Portia, and several others, including some that are smaller and less well-known.
